install.note: Grok Build is in beta but openly installable — NO subscription required. Authenticate via `grok login` (browser OAuth, token in ~/.grok/auth.json) or the XAI_API_KEY env var. The installer drops `grok` (plus an `agent` ACP entry point) under ~/.grok/bin/ on every OS; on Windows add %USERPROFILE%\.grok\bin to PATH. WSL uses the Linux binary. Environment variables: GROK_CHANNEL (stable|alpha|enterprise, default stable), GROK_BIN_DIR (override install path), GROK_PROXY_URL (HTTP proxy), GROK_HOME (override config dir, default ~/.grok).

first_run.description: Grok Build authenticates via xAI account OR via env-var API key. EchoBird's model switcher uses the env-var path; the user only needs to run `grok login` when they restore to xAI Official.

auth_methods.browser oauth (default): grok login   # opens a browser to authenticate with xAI; token persists in ~/.grok/auth.json
auth_methods.api key (headless / no-browser): export XAI_API_KEY=xai-...   # bypass the browser flow; required for SSH / scripts
auth_methods.echobird custom model: Set via the App Manager; EchoBird writes ~/.grok/config.toml and ~/.echobird/grok.json. When EchoBird launches grok, ECHOBIRD_GROK_API_KEY is injected automatically.

first_run.verify: grok --version   # confirms install; `grok inspect` shows discovered config sources, skills, plugins, hooks, MCP servers

cli.description: Grok Build supports a headless flag set similar to other coding CLIs, useful for scripts and remote sessions.
supported_flags: -m, --model <MODEL>    pick a model by name from ~/.grok/config.toml
-s, --session-id <ID>  create or resume a named headless session
-c, --continue         continue the most recent session in the current directory
cli.acp_mode: grok agent stdio   # run as an Agent Client Protocol agent over JSON-RPC on stdin/stdout (for IDE / tool integration)
cli.output_formats: plain (human-readable text), json (one JSON object at the end), streaming-json (newline-delimited incremental events)

blocked_regions.zh-CN: x.ai and docs.x.ai are accessible from mainland China without a VPN, but speeds can be unstable. If the install script download times out, use GROK_PROXY_URL=<your http proxy> before running the curl command.

identity_guard.description: Grok Build is xAI's official coding CLI, binary name `grok`. It is DIFFERENT from: the standalone Grok chat app at grok.com (web / iOS / Android), Grokipedia, and any third-party 'grok-cli' npm packages.

common_confusions.grok.com web app: grok.com is the consumer chat interface for the Grok model — NOT a CLI. Grok Build is a separate terminal coding agent.
common_confusions.third_party_grok_cli: Several community npm packages use the name 'grok-cli' but are unrelated to xAI. The official one is installed via curl-pipe-bash from https://x.ai/cli, NOT via npm.
